About Me

Building the backbone of modern telecommunications

Solution Architect and Data Scientist with 15+ years of telecommunications expertise, specializing in AI/ML-driven network optimization and predictive analytics for 5G/4G Core networks. Proven track record of architecting scalable cloud-native solutions for major telecom operators. Expert in transforming complex telecom data into actionable business intelligence while leading cross-functional teams to deliver enterprise-grade solutions that improve network performance and reduce operational costs.

5G Core

AMF, SMF, UPF, PCF design and deployment

IMS / VoLTE

CSCF, TAS, SBC, HSS architecture

Data & ML

Python, SQL analytics & ML pipelines

Documentation

HLD, LLD, ISD, ATP technical writing

Technical Expertise

Skills & Technologies

Deep knowledge across network functions, protocols, standards, and programming tools.

AI/ML & Data Science

Python R Machine Learning Deep Learning Predictive Modeling Statistical Analysis Feature Engineering Real-time Analytics

Cloud & Architecture

OpenStack Kubernetes/OpenShift GCP Vertex AI Docker Microservices CI/CD DevOps Solution Architecture

Telecommunications

5G/4G Core Networks (EPC, 5GC) IMS V2X Communications Network Function Virtualization (VNF/CNF) Telecom Protocol Stack (SIP, Diameter, GTP, NGAP, PFCP)

Development & Tools

C++ Kotlin Flutter SQL Bash Tableau Alteryx Elasticsearch Grafana Prometheus Jenkins Git

Languages

English (Advanced) Dutch (Intermediate) French (Basic)

Portfolio

Featured Projects

A selection of technical projects spanning network architecture, analytics, and automation.

Voice Quality Analyzer & Diagnostic Tool

Developed telco-grade RTP stream analyzer with MOS and R-Factor calculations based on ITU-T G.107 E-model, featuring machine learning classifications and full-stack web interface deployed via Docker containers.

AI & Machine Learning Full-Stack Web ITU-T G.107 Docker

5G KPI Anomaly Detection System

Created multi-dimensional 5G Core KPI analysis tool following latest 3GPP releases, incorporating events, alarms, and configuration data correlation for real-time network degradation detection.

5G Core KPI Analysis 3GPP Anomaly Detection

V2X Communication QoS Predictor

Built advanced machine learning models using XGBoost and Neural Networks for sidelink and cellular QoS prediction in connected mobility scenarios, achieving industry-leading accuracy in vehicular communication.

V2X Machine Learning XGBoost Neural Networks QoS Prediction
